title: Multipurpose
description: Adds extra uses for minecraft features with narrow utility.
body:
![ModLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a895eebfb35bdc3b052a6ac4e0b075eb5be906a3.png)

Multipurpose is a mod with the aim of integrating blocks/items/mobs with the game world, by extending the use of features that might feel overlooked in the base game.

For now the only item is the "Armadillo Boots" made with the new scute item, as a counterpart to the turtle helmet, it countains all the properties of leather armor while providing better protection, can be dyed and trimmed, and even walk over powder snow!

![Armadillo Boots Dyed Multiple Colors and Trimmed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67478b486bb307f32de432ce9dc46bf9761e0d75.png)


Feel free to open a suggestion on the GitHub issues about things that you think would fit into the mod.
